mapper.select:
SELECT sb.id, sb.name,
CASE WHEN srb.role_id IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END AS checked
false AS checked
FROM sys_button sb
LEFT JOIN sys_role_button srb ON srb.button_id = sb.id AND srb.role_id = #{roleId}
ORDER BY sb.id
SELECT sb.code FROM sys_button sb JOIN sys_role_button srb ON srb.button_id = sb.id JOIN sys_user_role sur ON srb.role_id = sur.role_id WHERE sur.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT sur.user_id from sys_user_role sur JOIN sys_role_button srb on sur.role_id = srb.role_id WHERE srb.button_id = #{buttonId}
